locations.name: 温带森林
locations.summary: 温带森林是指位于温带地区，介于热带雨林和北方針葉林之间的森林。它是第二大陆地生物群落，佔世界森林面积的25% ，仅次于佔世界森林面積约33%的北方針葉林。南北半球均為温带森林，分佈在纬度25度至50度之间的區域 。由于其面积广阔，横跨多个…

relations.subject: Large-billed scrubwren
relations.evidence: howei is found in West Gippsland and the Strzelecki Ranges of southern Victoria. Its preferred habitat is rainforest in the tropics and wet sclerophyll forest in temperate areas. It is sedentary and more common in the north of its range
